sqlCommands.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, Amt1, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Ledger, '2008', GL, '' as PC, '' as CC, '' as TP, '' as BusCat, Flex4, coalesce(UWYR,'') as UWYR, '' as TTY, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass4' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL > '4000000' group by KeyID, Ledger, GL,  Flex4, coalesce(UWYR,''))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' where BusCat = 'XX'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,TP,BusCat,TTY,Flex1,Amt1) (select KeyID, 'Var' as Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL,TP,BusCat,TTY,Flex1, round(sum(case when Ledger = 'IR' then Amt1 else -Amt1 end),2) as Amt1  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,TP,BusCat,TTY,Flex1)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and not GL = '3610000'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = c.Name from TransX t inner join TPs c on t.TP = c.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger in ('IF','IR')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt2 = 0
update TransX set amt1 = amt2, ledger = 'Z000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = Contract from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex4 = case when co = '2300' then '22374' when co = '2400' then '22371' when co = '2450' then '23797' else contract end from TransX
update TransX set Amt1 = round(0-Amt1,2), Flex1 = 'pass1' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,3) + '9901' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL, len(GL)-3,4) = '9900'

insert into TransX (KeyID,CC,Flex1,CCdesc,Co,CCCat,Flex2,Flex3,Hierarchy,PC,Flex4,RefKey1,Contract,Flex5,Flex6,RefKey2,Flex7,Flex8,Flex9,PCdesc,Txt,Division,Region,Location,Zone) (select '[batchID]',CCtr,c.Name,c.Descr,c.Co,Cat,c.Typ,Func,p.Hierarchy,c.PCtr,c.ValidThru,BlockAct,ReplacementCC,c.UpdatedOn,c.UpdatedBy,ExpNode,c.Hierarchy,c.Dept,c.Person,c.Flex1,c.Flex2,p.Division,p.Region,p.Location,p.Zone from CCTRS c inner join Pctrs p on c.Pctr = p.Pctr inner join (Select Co from Companies where Co in (select co from Companies c inner join ElimSelect e on ((c.Co >= e.FromVal and c.Co <= e.ThruVal and e.Oper = 'BT') or (c.Co = e.FromVal and e.Oper = 'EQ')) and e.IncExcl = 'I' inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'CoSelect' and (substring(m.Descr,1,4) = '[CoSelect]' or m.Descr = '[CoSelect]') and e.ElimID = 'Co:' + m.ID) and not co in (select co from Companies c inner join ElimSelect e on ((c.Co >= e.FromVal and c.Co <= e.ThruVal and e.Oper = 'BT') or (c.Co = e.FromVal and e.Oper = 'EQ')) and e.IncExcl = 'E' inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'CoSelect' and (substring(m.Descr,1,4) = '[CoSelect]' or m.Descr = '[CoSelect]') and e.ElimID = 'Co:' + m.ID)) j on c.co = j.co)
update TransX set GL = replace(GL,'321','021') from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '321%'
update TransX set GL = replace(GL,'021','321') from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '021%'
update TransX set PC = '141CPW0000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1143900'
update TransX set PC = '141SCP0000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1144000'
update TransX set PC = '141QUE0000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1144100'
update TransX set PC = '141SAB0000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1144600'
update TransX set PC = '141SBG0000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1144700'
update TransX set Contract = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GL = replace(GL,'321','021') from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '321%'
update TransX set GL = replace(GL,'021','321') from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '021%'
update TransX set Amt1 = Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
